notes: Pi's REPL is persistent across the recipe's two turns. Spec asserts: (1) session born in ready, (2) turn1 cycle ready→working→ready, (3) idle window with no transcript_removed, (4) turn2 cycle ready→working→ready. Production daemon readyTTL (30 min) > 20 s idle, so this proves continuity rather than TTL survival.

text: First user prompt drives ready → working
First turn completes back to ready before the idle window
Second user prompt (after 20s idle) drives ready → working
Second turn completes back to ready
